title: Learning Assistants Spring 2026 | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Learning Assistants Spring 2026
Zhuo ChenBUSF&ECON LABUSF-SHU 303 Corporate Finance, ECON-SHU 301 Econometrics
Shirshak Poudel Economics LAECON-SHU 202: Intermediate Macroeconomics, ECON-SHU 3 Microeconomics
Jinkun(Stella) HuangEconomics LAECON-SHU 3 Microeconomics, ECON-SHU 251 Economics of Global Business
Eleanor Nguyen Economics LAECON-SHU 202 Intermediate Macroeconomics, ECON-SHU 1 Principles of Macroeconomics
Guanheng (Harry) CenEconomics LAECON-SHU 1 Principles of Macroeconomics, ECON-SHU 251 Economics of Global BusinessHi! I’m Harry, a senior majoring in Data Science and Business and Finance. I’m interested in data science and related topics, and I really appreciate the opportunity to help with any questions you might have. I also enjoy playing tennis, basketball, and bouldering. Looking forward to seeing you at ARC!
